mapper.sql: id , reporter_id, reporter_name, reported_type, related_id, reported_id, reported_name, report_type, reason, evidence, anonymous, report_status, handle_result, handle_reason, handler_id, handler_name, handle_time, create_time, update_time, deleted, deleted_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO report (reporter_id, reporter_name, reported_type, related_id, reported_id, reported_name, report_type, reason, evidence, anonymous, report_status, handle_result, handle_reason, handler_id, handler_name, handle_time, create_time, update_time, deleted) VALUES (#{reporterId}, #{reporterName}, #{reportedType.code}, #{relatedId}, #{reportedId}, #{reportedName}, #{reportType.code}, #{reason}, #{evidence}, #{anonymous.code}, #{reportStatus.code}, #{handleResult.code}, #{handleReason}, #{handlerId}, #{handlerName}, #{handleTime}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, #{deleted})
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM report WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE report SET related_id = #{relatedId}, report_type = #{reportType.code}, report_status = #{reportStatus.code}, handle_result = #{handleResult.code}, handle_reason = #{handleReason}, handler_id = #{handlerId}, handler_name = #{handlerName}, handle_time = #{handleTime}, update_time = #{updateTime} WHERE id = #{id}
